creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
At Thu, 8 Mar 2001 14:04:44 +0100 (CET),
freebsd-admin@blender.nl wrote:
> -.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
>  	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/blender
>  	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${PREFIX}/share/doc/blender
>  	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/copyright.txt ${PREFIX}/share/doc/blender
> -.endif

Why you remove NOPORTDOCS? If you want install docs for every user,
pkg-plist need to be fixed too.
